ogTitle: Dunrobin vs Durham Lead: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Dunrobin and Durham Lead.
heading: Dunrobin vs Durham Lead — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Dunrobin, Victoria and Durham Lead, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Durham Lead has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Dunrobin (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Dunrobin or Durham Lead safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Dunrobin has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Durham Lead scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Dunrobin scores 29/100 for bushfire risk. Durham Lead scores 31/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Dunrobin or Durham Lead?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Durham Lead has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
